title: Incredibly Light Italian San Marzano Tomato Pasta
description: A fresh and aerated Mediterranean dish featuring San Marzano tomatoes, double fried KFC style garlic and ayurvedic rajasic friendly ingredients.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and double fry the garlic until crispy.
Add the crushed San Marzano tomatoes to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season the tomato sauce with salt and black pepper to taste.
Drain the cooked spaghetti and add it to the skillet with the tomato sauce.
Toss the spaghetti in the tomato sauce until well coated.
Stir in the chopped basil and grated parmesan cheese.
Serve the pasta hot and enjoy.
Garnish with additional basil and parmesan cheese if desired.
